source.business_scenario: 嵌套 ORDER BY(外层 + 内层各排一次)
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT * FROM rental ORDER BY rental_date LIMIT 100
) t
ORDER BY customer_id
